buildCommand: prisma migrate deploy && prisma generate && next build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://*.vercel-insights.com; frame-ancestors 'none'
